name: What results should I expect from voice search near me optimization?
description: Expect more visibility for high-intent local searches, especially calls, directions, and bookings. It works best when people are already ready to act.

mainEntity.name: What results should I expect from voice search near me optimization?

acceptedAnswer.text: The ideal outcome is more visibility for nearby, high-intent searches such as calls, directions, bookings, and visits. Voice search usually helps most when the customer already knows what they want and is ready to act quickly.
acceptedAnswer.description: Expect more visibility for high-intent local searches, especially calls, directions, and bookings. It works best when people are already ready to act.
